linting.notes: Ruff is configured for Python 3.12 with strict checks including security (bandit), comprehensions, pyupgrade, and Pylint rules. Hadolint lints all container definitions with ODH-specific label requirements. Can also run via tox: 'tox -e lint'

setup_required: Build container images: ./scripts/build.sh python-3.12 or ./scripts/build.sh cuda-12.8
Set environment variables: PYTHON_IMAGE and/or CUDA_IMAGE
testing.mock_patterns: Uses session-scoped ContainerRunner class that starts containers once and reuses them via 'podman exec' for efficiency
testing.notes: Tests are integration tests that require podman and pre-built container images. Tests use session-scoped fixtures to start containers once per test run. Without PYTHON_IMAGE/CUDA_IMAGE env vars, pytest skips tests. Can also run via tox: 'tox -e test'

gating_checks.name: lint
gating_checks.command: ruff check tests/ && ruff format --check tests/

gating_checks.name: ci-status
gating_checks.command: Aggregator job that ensures all checks pass

advisory_checks.name: check-cuda-versions
advisory_checks.command: Weekly check for new NVIDIA CUDA versions

ci.notes: CI uses smart path-based filtering to only build/test changed images. Matrix builds for multiple Python/CUDA versions. CUDA builds require ~30GB disk space and use free-disk-space actions. Tekton pipelines handle production builds.

build.notes: Project builds container images, not traditional software. scripts/build.sh wraps podman build with proper build args from <type>/<version>/app.conf files. Dev dependencies include tox, pytest, ruff, mypy.

conventions.import_style: Absolute imports, sorted with isort (part of ruff), known-first-party=['tests']
conventions.notes: Tests use session-scoped fixtures and must be idempotent (read-only). Type hints required except in test files. Strict mypy configuration with disallow_untyped_defs.

lint_commands.notes: Exit 0: All 7 Containerfiles passed linting (requires hadolint installed)
Exit 0: Success: no issues found in 5 source files
Exit 0: Runs ruff check, ruff format --check, and lint-containerfile.sh

test_commands.notes: Requires PYTHON_IMAGE and/or CUDA_IMAGE env vars with pre-built container images. Tests skip without these.

container_recipe.notes: Hadolint must be installed separately (not in PyPI). The lint script can use containerized hadolint if podman/docker is available. Tests require building actual container images first, which needs significant resources.

gaps: Tests require building container images before running, which needs podman and significant resources
CUDA image builds require ~30GB disk space and are not validated in this analysis
Integration tests cannot run without PYTHON_IMAGE/CUDA_IMAGE environment variables pointing to built images
No unit tests exist - all tests are integration tests against running containers
Build script (./scripts/build.sh) requires podman/docker and cannot be validated without it
Tekton pipeline configs exist but are not analyzed for local validation
